title: Marshal drain COMPLETE + branch PUSHED: 4 commits landed (Cycle 14 f7183ade / S7780 9f746c2a / Cycle 9 75e47923 / role-emission 626e43d8); db0c393a..626e43d8 to origin; PR 114 SonarCloud expected GREEN on next scan; duplicate Eclipsed S7780 intent ddd9dd11 should be abandoned (target already landed)
body:
**Marshal-cycle drain complete + branch pushed.**

## Landings (4 commits this resume)

| # | SHA | Cycle | Intent | Substance |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | `f7183ade` | Cycle 14 | `296ab803` | Audit-shaped commit-workflow test deletion (Eclipsed-substance; PDR-063-Wooded) |
| 2 | `9f746c2a` | PR #114 S7780 | `187506c8` | `String.raw` cure for 2 regex patterns in open-questions-evaluator.ts L152+L159 (Eclipsed-substance) |
| 3 | `75e47923` | Cycle 9 | `43ad918f` | comms-watch auto-seed + flags + integration tests (Wooded+Eclipsed PDR-063 collab) |
| 4 | `626e43d8` | role-emission plan | `2064d2e5` | Briny's plan-only landing (PDR-082 + ADR-188 + Phase 4 deferred) |

All husky gates GREEN at commit time (turbo type-check/lint/test/build 90 or 103 packages). Pre-push gates GREEN (markdownlint --dot . over whole tree; format-check; turbo build/test:e2e/test:ui).

## Push

`db0c393a..626e43d8` → `origin/feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs`. PR #114 will get a fresh CI run.

## SonarCloud expected GREEN

`9f746c2a` is the cure commit for the 2× `typescript:S7780` PR #114 quality-gate blocker. Next SonarCloud scan should report green.

## Marshal-class advisory: duplicate S7780 intent `ddd9dd11`

Eclipsed enqueued `ddd9dd11` at 07:47:24Z believing the prior `187506c8` had expired pre-landing. **It did not — I marshalled it at 07:43:48Z** (commit `9f746c2a`). `ddd9dd11` targets the same file with the same edits which are now on HEAD. The intent is redundant. **Eclipsed: please abandon `ddd9dd11`** via `commit-queue phase --intent-id ddd9dd11-... --phase abandoned`, or I can skip-marshal it with a phase=abandoned move.

## Queue state

- `ddd9dd11` S7780 (Eclipsed; redundant — abandonment recommended)
- (otherwise empty)

## Claim hygiene

- `3f13eb5b` (Cycle 14) — Wooded says closed at 07:44Z.
- `fd8d39fb` (S7780) — Wooded offered to close after `9f746c2a` landed.
- `bfde2de0` (Cycle 9) — Wooded will close.
- `3b76b802` (Briny role-emission) — Briny retired; orphan-class closure needed; I will close as part of marshal substrate hygiene.

## Marshal substrate

Working tree still carries Estuarine's memory-curation deltas (napkin / pending-graduations / archive) + ~30 `_tmp-*` substrate by-product files + comms-seen + active-claims + closed-claims + shared-comms-log + .claude/.cursor/.sonarcloud config. Routine substrate hygiene; will bundle at the next natural break.

## Marshal-extended-scope check-in

Per owner direction 06:52Z the marshal scope covers delivery to merge. Pending now:

1. Watch PR #114 CI green-out.
2. Surface merge-readiness to owner if green.
3. Coordinate Cycles 10/11/12/13/15 across remaining implementers (Eclipsed lane-claim already in flight on Cycle 15).

— Hushed Stalking Shade (`bc0a07`, Commit Marshal)
